title: The Star Wars Cookbook II: Darth Malt and More Galactic Recipes
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Cookbook|more=Darth}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Darth_Malt_Cookbook.jpg]] |title=''The Star Wars Cookbook II:
Darth Malt and More Galactic Recipes'' |author=[[Frankie Frankeny]] and [[Wesley Martin]] |cover artist=Frankie Frankeny |illustrator=Frankie Frankeny |editor= |publisher=[[Chronicle Books]] |release date=[[July]] [[2000]]{{Chronicle|url=the-star-wars-cookbook-2.html|text=The Star Wars® Cookbook II: Darth Malt and More Galactic Recipes|nolive=1}} |type=Hardcover |pages=62 |dimensions=6.5 x 8.5 in |weight= |isbn=0811828034 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''The Star Wars Cookbook II: Darth Malt and More Galactic Recipes''''' is the sequel to ''[[The Star Wars Cookbook: Wookiee Cookies and Other Galactic Recipes]]''. ==Publisher's summary== ''Even the pickiest of Gungans will eat their fruits and veggies when Bubble City Salad and Boss Nass Broccoli are on the menu. With this exciting new sequel to the best-selling ''The Star Wars Cookbook: Wookiee Cookies and Other Galactic Recipes'', ''Star Wars'' fans of all ages can cook up more out-of-this-world fun. From razor-toothed Opee's Sea Crunch (for fish fillets with a real bite) to Darth Double Dogs (doubling as a light saber [sic] you can eat!), this intergalactic ''Star Wars'' cookbook features healthy snacks, delicious dishes, sweet treats, and easy main courses no Rebel can resist. Featuring hilarious photographs and recipes and wipe-clean pages, ''The Star Wars Cookbook II'' even includes a shiny plastic stencil of Darth Maul to help decorate culinary creations. And age is no issue when the Force is with you—adults as well as kids will have a great time with this book.'' ==Contents== ===Breakfasts=== *[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Speeder/Legends|Speeder]] [[Star/Legends|Sunrise]] *[[Boonta/Legends|Boonta]] Classic Waffles *[[The Force/Legends|Forceful]] Frittata *[[Booma/Legends|Booma]] Breakfast Tarts *[[Handmaiden/Legends|Handmaiden]] Hash Browns ===Snacks and Sides=== *''Star Wars'' Pretzels *[[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] Dip *Pickle [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar]] *[[Tongue/Legends|Tongue]]-Numbing Nachos *[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]] Challah *[[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Nass]] Broccoli *[[Otoh Gunga|Bubble city]] Salad ===Main Courses=== *Padme Pad Thai *[[Naboo/Legends|Nabooli]] Forest *[[Opee sea killer/Legends|Opee sea]] Crunch *[[Sando aqua monster/Legends|Sando Aqua Monster]] Soup *Darth Double Dogs *[[DUM-series pit droid/Legends|Pit droid]] Pizza *Protocol Droid Pasta ===Desserts and Treats=== *Hideous [[Palpatine/Legends|Sidious]] Sorbet *[[Watto/Legends|Watto]]-melon Cubes *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin's]] Apple Crisp *[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]-ger Snaps *[[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Panakacakes]] ===Drinks=== *[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Slush *[[Sio Bibble/Legends|Bibble]] Bubble *[[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba's]] Sinister Cider *[[Midi-chlorian/Legends|Midi-chlorian]] Concoction *Darth Malt ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/ref/news20000517.html|text=What's Cooking: ''Darth Malt''}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Chronicle|url=the-star-wars-cookbook-2.html|text=The Star Wars® Cookbook II: Darth Malt and More Galactic Recipes|nolive=1}} {{Interlang |de=The Star Wars Cookbook II – Darth Malt and More Galactic Recipes }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Star Wars Cookbook 2}} [[Category:The Star Wars Cookbook| 2]]
